title: The Tomb Beneath Alubarna
main_description: Crocodile drags the conflict toward the royal tomb and the truth of Pluton while Robin watches the plan unfold. The chapter has been revised into display-ready parts with Alabasta-arc character context, cleaned dialogue, and corrected scene framing.
key_events: Robin Reads the Path to Pluton
Luffy Pushes Back Toward the Fight
